arts.ttl: Crystal Palace already in talks with player and club over transfer – ‘Opened the door’ to January addition
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are eyeing a move for Benfica winger Jan-Niklas Beste in the January transfer window. That’s according to journalist Sacha Tavolieri writing for Sky Sports Switzerland, who reports that Crystal Palace have ‘fallen under the spell’ of the German midfielder.
